clue: Liaison revealed by a very loud voice
explanation: AFFAIR: liaison. A, FF (very loud), AIR (to voice something is to air it).
hints: Our answer will be a kind of liaison...
In music notation, FF (fortissimo) means "very loud".
We need a word that means "to voice".
In this clue, the "a" is literal. In this case, that just means our answer starts with the letter A.
